title: Bare Bones x Connected Carpets
description: Simplify the textures of Connected Carpets to fit Bare Bones style !
body:
This resource pack simplify the textures of [Connected Carpets](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gm4-connected-carpets) to fit with Bare Bones resource pack

You have to place it above the default Connected Carpets in the resource pack list to make it work
